description: Create a GitHub Actions workflow named CI that runs on every push to the master branch and on pull requests to the master branch. The workflow should have three jobs: build-linux, build-windows, and build-emscripten. Each job should check out the repository with submodules, then perform a build using CMake. The build-linux job should run on ubuntu-20.04, install dependencies, and build in debug mode. The build-windows job should run on windows-latest, use a vcpkg cache, and build with a specific toolchain file. The build-emscripten job should run on ubuntu-20.04, set up emsdk version 1.39.20, and build with Emscripten.
